# This directory stores the vector database, extracted images, and processed JSON files.
# It is intentionally empty in the repository.
#
# After you process your own papers, the following will be auto-generated here:
#   base_db/         -- ChromaDB / FAISS vector store
#   images/          -- Extracted figures from PDFs
#   documents.json   -- Chunked text segments
#   context.json     -- Contextual embeddings
#   titles.json      -- Paper title index
#   pdf_content.json -- Raw PDF extracts
